text: A young man dressed in a business suit and sitting in a vehicle smiles.
This motorcycle is leaning low to take a curve.
A man is teaching a young girl to use a toothbrush.
A photo of someone's sandwich with cheese and bacon.
A living room has a glass coffee table and white furniture.
A person in a baseball uniform swinging a bat.
A very dimly lit kitchen with a window over the sink.
A man walking a dog on the side walk.
A man standing holding a skateboard vertical in one hand.
A couple of men standing next to a children pool and toy house.
